name: Canny Cannelloni
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the can of salmon and make juice up to 300ml (1/2 pint) by mixing with water.
2. Mash the fish, onion, breadcrumbs, mushrooms, and parsley together.
3. Fill each cannelloni roll with the mixture.
4. Place in a microwave-safe dish.
5. Melt butter and stir in flour. Cook for 30 seconds on HIGH POWER.
6. Beat the fish stock and milk into the flour mixture (150ml / 1/4 pint) at a time, cooking for 1 minute between additions. Whisk well.
7. Add pesto and 75g (3oz) of Parmesan cheese.
8. Pour over the cannelloni.
9. Sprinkle with remaining cheese and cover.
10. Cook on MEDIUM POWER for 25 minutes.
11. Stand for 5 minutes before serving.
Serves 4-6. Approx. 300 kcals per serving.
